framework.name: HP vs HNP Transaction Modes
framework.description: AP2 formally splits agent commerce into Human-Present (real-time, user confirms cart) and Human-Not-Present (delegated, agent acts autonomously within Intent Mandate boundaries). HNP mode explicitly allows agent to create Cart Mandates WITHOUT human callback — this is genuine pre-authorized spending authority with cryptographic proof.
framework.raw_quote: In HNP scenarios, the Intent Mandate allows the agent to create a Cart Mandate once the exact parameters have been met.

source.title: What is the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) and How Does It Work?
